default_baseline.description: Indicates whether this patch baseline should be the default baseline for the selected operating system.

name_prefix.description: A prefix to be added to the name of the patch baseline, making it easier to identify.

operating_system.description: Specifies the operating system type that the patch baseline applies to, such as 'WINDOWS', 'AMAZON_LINUX', etc.

owner.description: The owner of the patch baseline, typically specifying who created or manages it, such as 'AWS' or 'Self'.
